item.title: PowerShell + DevOps Global Summit 2025 - Printing Swag
item.description: For the last several months I have been working on a few things for the 2025 PowerShell + DevOps Global Summit (which I will refer to as ‘Summit’). I wrote this entry in advance, and scheduled the post to publish just as the doors to Summit are opening. If you are in Bellevue, WA for the conference, please, find me, give me a high-five, and tell me a joke or something! I love meeting people and talking shop! And (on this titled topic) make sure to pick up some swag!
